body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `ErrorAdditionalInfo.info`

```ts
readonly info?: any;
```

The `info` property is typed as `any`, which weakens type safety for consumers. This is a known emitter issue where the generator maps the ARM spec's open-ended `additionalInfo` object to `any` instead of `Record<string, unknown>`.

**Fix:** Please report this in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues) so the emitter can be updated to emit `Record<string, unknown>` (or a more specific type) for this well-known ARM common type.

This is the initial release of `@azure/arm-alertrulerecommendations` (v1.0.0-beta.1) for the `2023-08-01-preview` API. CI checks are passing. Two tool-level issues were found where the emitter generated `any` types in the public API surface — both are generator bugs that should be tracked upstream.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37563,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/alertrulerecommendations/arm-alertrulerecommendations/review/arm-alertrulerecommendations-node.api.md","line":76,"issueType":"tool","category":"any-type","description":"ErrorAdditionalInfo.info is typed as `any` instead of `Record<string, unknown>`"},{"file":"sdk/alertrulerecommendations/arm-alertrulerecommendations/review/arm-alertrulerecommendations-node.api.md","line":134,"issueType":"tool","category":"any-type","description":"RuleArmTemplate.parameters, .resources, and .variables are typed as `any`/`any[]` instead of Record<string, unknown> / Record<string, unknown>[]"}]}
```

</details>
